basic_details.job_title: DMHO Srikakulam Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for DEO, Data Manager and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Medical and Health Office Srikakulam
basic_details.post_name: Data Manager, Lab Assistant, Data entry Operator
basic_details.short_information: District Medical and Health Office Srikakulam (DMHO Srikakulam) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 3 Data Manager, Lab Assistant, Data entry Operator. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for healthcare jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 05 years Ex-service Men: 03 years Differently abled persons: 10 years Maximum age limit with all relaxations: 52 years

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation in Computer Science or BE in IT/Electronic for Data Manager; Lab Attendant training or Intermediate with Lab Assistant Vocational Course for Lab Assistant; Graduate with at least 1 year diploma in computer applications for Data Entry Operator.
qualification.details: Data Manager: Post Graduation prescribed in computer science with minimum 01 year of experience, or BE in IT/Electronic. Lab Assistant: Lab Attendant training, or Intermediate with Lab Assistant Vocational Course. Data entry Operator: Graduate with at least 1 year diploma in computer applications.

salary_details.pay_scale: Data Manager: Rs.36,225/-, Lab Assistant: Rs.15,000/-, Data Entry Operator: Rs.18450/-
salary_details.details: Data Manager: Rs.36,225/- Lab Assistant: Rs.15,000/- Data Entry Operator: Rs.18450/-

selection_process: Based on aggregate of marks obtained in qualifying examination Weightage for experience Weightage for contract/outsourcing/honorarium service Counselling
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DMHO Srikakulam Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://Srikakulamdistrict.ap.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DMHO Srikakulam Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DMHO Srikakulam Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DMHO Srikakulam Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Data Manager: Post Graduation prescribed in computer science with minimum 01 year of experience, or BE in IT/Electronic. Lab Assistant: Lab Attendant training, or Intermediate with Lab Assistant Vocational Course. Data entry Operator: Graduate with at least 1 year diploma in computer applications.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules: SC/ST/BC/EWS: 05 years Ex-service Men: 03 years Differently abled persons: 10 years Maximum age limit with all relaxations: 52 years

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Data Manager: Rs.36,225/- Lab Assistant: Rs.15,000/- Data Entry Operator: Rs.18450/-

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Based on aggregate of marks obtained in qualifying examination Weightage for experience Weightage for contract/outsourcing/honorarium service Counselling

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DMHO Srikakulam Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://Srikakulamdistrict.ap.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DMHO Srikakulam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DMHO Srikakulam Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 18th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the different posts available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment drive by DMHO Srikakulam offers vacancies for three different posts: Data Manager, Lab Assistant, and Data Entry Operator, all under the IDSP-DSU program.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Data Manager post?
faq.answer: For the Data Manager post, candidates must have a Post Graduation in Computer Science with at least one year of experience, or a BE in IT/Electronic qualification.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for reserved categories. SC/ST/BC/EWS candidates get 05 years, Ex-service Men get 03 years, and Differently abled persons get 10 years of relaxation.

faq.question: Q5. How will the candidates be selected for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on the aggregate marks obtained in the qualifying examination, with weightage given to experience and contract/outsourcing service, followed by counselling.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for OC and BC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for candidates belonging to OC and BC categories is Rs. 500/-. Candidates from SC and ST categories need to pay Rs. 350/-, while Physically Challenged candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Lab Assistant post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Lab Assistant post is Rs. 15,000/- per month. Other posts have different salary structures as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Srikakulam district, which is https://Srikakulamdistrict.ap.gov.in. The form will be available from 09.07.2026.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The jobs offered under this recruitment are on a Contract/Out sourcing basis. This means the employment is temporary and for a specific period as per the contract terms.

faq.question: Q10. Where should the filled application form be submitted?
faq.answer: Filled-in applications should be submitted at the Office of the District Medical and Health Officer (DM&HO), Srikakulam district, as per the instructions in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the DMHO Srikakulam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the DMHO Srikakulam Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 18th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this date.
